This was my first ever Resident Evil game, and my first ever survival horror game too — honestly didn't expect it to hit this hard.

Played through Leon's campaign in one long sitting — couldn't put it down. The atmosphere in the RPD is incredible, the resource management actually makes you think, and the tension never lets up. Every bullet feels like it matters, every save room feels like a tiny relief before the next nightmare.
Going in blind to both the genre and the franchise, I expected to be overwhelmed. Instead I'm hooked.
